name: Beta-Glucan
description: A powerful anti-aging humectant derived from oats or yeast that penetrates deep into skin for lasting hydration.
scientificSummary: Beta-glucan has a smaller molecular weight than hyaluronic acid, allowing it to penetrate deeper into the dermis.
mechanismOfAction: Activates macrophages, stimulates wound healing, and deeply hydrates by reaching the dermal layer where collagen is produced.

seo.title: Beta-Glucan - Deep Hydration & Anti-Aging | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Beta-Glucan penetrates deeper than hyaluronic acid to deliver lasting hydration and reduce fine lines.
